prompt: An impossible grand interior of a colossal palace-library called Library of Infinite Echoes, photographed as a cinematic ultra-wide 8mm rectilinear architectural shot from a perfectly centered, symmetrical viewpoint. The scene shows a single vast central nave stretching to an unreachable vanishing point, with impossibly tall rows of black marble and gilded columns rising floor to ceiling on both sides, dense multi-story bookshelves packed with old leather-bound volumes, white veined marble walls, carved classical statues set into niches, ornate gold detailing, and hanging lanterns glowing warmly. In the exact foreground center stands 1 lone human figure in a long dark cloak, seen from behind at a monumental reading desk with 1 giant open book and small scholarly instruments on the tabletop, emphasizing scale and awe. The polished black stone floor is mirror-reflective, doubling the columns and golden light. Massive shafts of radiant amber sunlight pour from high unseen openings above and along the upper walls, filling the hall with luminous haze, dust motes, and divine volumetric glow. The architecture should feel hyper-detailed, baroque, sacred, and physically impossible, with endless vertical repetition, intricate ornament, surreal depth, and a dreamlike sense of infinity. Color palette dominated by molten gold, bronze, black marble, ivory stone, and warm firelit highlights. Render as an epic photorealistic fantasy architectural visualization, extremely detailed, sharp, majestic, immersive, and awe-inspiring.
